description_long: This beer garden features a large, rectangular open-air area with a prominent gabled-roof pavilion structure occupying one side. The pavilion appears to be constructed from corrugated metal or sheet metal roofing and wooden or dark-paneled walls, providing shelter and shade. In the open area, several round tables with attached benches are arranged in a loose cluster, each surrounded by orange circular boundaries, likely for seating or social distancing. The ground surface is dark, possibly paved or covered with asphalt, and there are a few small objects such as barrels or planters scattered around. The overall layout is spacious, with clear walkways between the tables and the main building. No decorative lighting or branded signage is visible, and the style is utilitarian and functional, with a slight rustic or industrial influence.
description: A spacious beer garden with a large gabled-roof pavilion and several round tables with benches arranged in clusters on a dark paved surface. The setting is open, functional, and slightly rustic with no visible decorative lighting or signage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pavilion, two benches, and several round tables with benches in the open area.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the gabled roof of the pavilion, with minimal detail of the open seating area visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the pavilion, two benches, and more round tables with benches, as well as a barrel or planter.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open seating area with four round tables and benches clearly visible, and the pavilion in the background.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: Round tables with attached benches are arranged in loose clusters, spaced apart on a paved surface with orange circular boundaries. No umbrellas or canopies are visible.
